recovery_point_head:
# CURSOR — live recovery point · updated 2026-06-30

## ⭐ JUNE 30 — GATE0 anti-hallucination matcher HARDENED (consult-first, Rule #19) · boshed 1ddca153
**Done:** closed two product_is_real() fail-opens (scripts/truth_guards.py) that let a HALLUCINATED
product clear the FAL-spend gate (Rule #12): (1) raw-substring over all profile/*.json passed a
greeting «عيد أضحى مبارك»; (2) any single ≥4-char caption token passed «أي منتج وهمي» (common word
«منتج»). Now: STRUCTURED read of product_truth.json only (both shapes: albaik top-level keys /
jurisha+alnasser d["products"]); pass only if query⊆real-name tokens; if client HAS product_truth
it's the AUTHORITY (no caption back-door); corpus fallback only for no-product_truth brands (full
phrase OR ≥2 sig tokens, never a single). Also render_openclaw GATE0 `except: pass` → FAIL-CLOSED.
**Test:** tests/test_truth_guards.py — 19 cases, exit 0 (real pass, fakes refuse, 3 live clients);
caption gauntlet still green. **Consulted DeepSeek+RABIE before+after: VERIFIED, no fail-open.**
**Residual (flagged, task_6f6385da):** no-product_truth brands (ecoffeecup/lnasserjewelry/myfitness)
can still pass a verbatim greeting via caption-overlap → give them product_truth or tighten that path.

---
# CURSOR — prior · updated 2026-06-23

## 🔺 STANDING GOAL (Mohamed, June 23) — the 24h orchestra, this week, NEVER STOP
**RABIE + Claude work 24/7 for the week. THE TOP: the SYSTEM produces 20 PERFECT complete posts
(photo + caption + everything), created ONE BY ONE, across the 3 clients (albaik · jurisha ·
myfitness), in DIFFERENT setups — each RABIE-judged perfect (harsh: 3=default, 4=proof, 5=rare)
before it counts.** Method: machine produces (Rule #12) → RABIE judges independent+harsh → fix the
MACHINE (or brief) → re-produce → bank when perfect → next. Never accept "fine". Money: $3 fal cap
(USD_CAP) gates renders — when it hits, ask Mohamed to raise it.
**RENDER CONSTRAINT (found June 23):** flux-2-pro/EDIT edits the product reference → it makes
PRODUCT-FORWARD shots well, but NOT human STORY scenes. So start product-forward (works); story-scene
rendering needs a different (generation) path — a Mohamed fork.
**Machine fixes banked toward the goal:** pick_reference matches product+flags gaps (833176fe) ·
render obeys face_visibility=never / faceless (d16206ca) · 7 fail-open gates closed (f6a464a1,3c1a4db7).

## ⭐ JUNE 24 SESSION — 8/20 PERFECT (RABIE = GPT-4o vision judge, harsh 3=default)
**Built rabie_judge.py** (scripts/) — GPT-4o vision scores product_truth/composition/cultural/
brand/caption 1-5 → bank/fix/kill. The mechanical RABIE.
**8 banked (perfect_0X_*.jpg in api/static/renders_v37/):** دبل بيك · سوبر رول · بيكيز · جريش ·
كرسبي بيك(5/5) · سليق(5/5) · تمن(4/5) · قرصان(4/5).
**Root machine fixes this session (all boshed):**
1. product_truth NESTED read — jurisha uses {"products":{}}, assembly lock was SILENT for ALL
   jurisha → now reads both flat(albaik)+nested. (008d9b5b)
2. image_prompt_strength=0.92 — anchor
recovery_point_tail:
D to
null (worn from the session) → kept originals (4/5, no regression). HUMAIN needs REST (drifts under sustained
load). 9/9 stays solid + HUMAIN-passed. Polish (4/5→5/5) is non-urgent + HUMAIN-limited — resumes as HUMAIN
recovers (longer gaps). AWAIT Mohamed's next-phase: polish-rest-of-set / P2 full-batches / P3 dev-handoff / myfitness-products.

## 🎨 PHOTO-FIX ARC (June 29 ~22:00) — Mohamed killed 5 posts = GENERIC photos → art-director wired + per-brand signature
After 9/9: post-by-post polish DONE (post1 hook-upgraded, 8 kept). C238 minds-read-voice+pains PROVEN (A/B). C239/b
HUMAIN drift ROOT-FIXED (proactive page-recycle every 12 calls in humain_lock, proven live). Then Mohamed JUDGED the
portal posts: APPROVED 3 (jurisha جريش-G03, albaik بيكيز-R05, albaik كرسبي-U01), KILLED 5 (albaik سوبر-رول + كومبو-بيك,
jurisha باشميل + تمن + سليق). Kill reason = photos GENERIC/STOCK. ROOT (3-chairs): art_director produced a deliberate
brief but it never reached the fal prompt (to_converter_args dropped it to chain+scene; openclaw built chain-mechanically)
= severed wire (Rule #6). FIXES bosh'd: C240 = wire the AD brief into the render (produce_complete_post persists brief +
--brief; render_openclaw appends [ART DIRECTION] block, fail-closed). C241 = PER-BRAND craft signature (each brand's own
visual_dna.capture_character + a fixed hero-focus move; NOT one fixed chiaroscuro — that was wrong-tone for bright ALBAIK,
GPT+DeepSeek vision flagged 'noir on a daylight brand'). PROVEN on سوبر رول: generic→bright-glossy distinctive; GPT-vision
+DeepSeek both SHIP; eatjurisha gets WARM ($0-verified). Spent $2.43/$15 (3 proof renders ~$0.09).
NEXT: AWAITING Mohamed's GO to render the OTHER 4 killed posts w/ per-brand signatures (~$0.12) → he re-judges. HUMAIN
drops during produce runs (caption→weak GPT) so ensure HUMAIN-up first. Gate no_fal_photos=False open. Then full-set
re-judge → P2 (full batches) / P3 (dev handoff). Loop holds at this gate (Rule #11, no spend without his go).

docs/REALITY.md: The honest one-pager. Written after the full-power audit + the orchestra's verdict on the 50-client
"Complete System Architecture" spec. That spec is a **north star, not a plan** — its values are right,
its scale/metrics/infra are pre-pivot fiction. This doc is what is TRUE.
## The three things — never conflate them
- **THE BRAIN** = `ogz-knowledge`: the produce pipeline (occasion → brief → CD-minds → 94-chain prompt →
docs/CONNECT_THE_BRAIN.md: # Connect the Brain — ogz-knowledge → the OGZ platform
**For the platform developers.** Your onboarding polls
profile, filled from the brand's sources. **ogz-knowledge produces exactly that JSON.** This doc is
how you plug it in. (Full field-by-field contract: [DEV_PLATFORM_INTEGRATION.md](DEV_PLATFORM_INTEGRATION.md).)
docs/DEV_PLATFORM_INTEGRATION.md: # DEV PLATFORM INTEGRATION — the connection contract (discovered June 27, 2026)
Discovered empirically by walking the live onboarding at `o-gz-studios-web-hlhi.vercel.app`
with albaik's data (a full signup + the 16-step "smart registration form"). This is the
contract ogz-knowledge (the brain) must fulfill. **Pipeline A (self-service) per ogz-knowledge's
docs/HOW_IT_WORKS.md: The mental model a developer needs to take this system over. Read this once, top to bottom, and
you'll understand every moving part. Then `HANDOVER.md` for setup + known issues, `README.md` for
the original build briefing, and `docs/` for deep dives.
HANDOVER.md: Developer onboarding for the OGZ Studios Saudi creative-intelligence system.
> **➡️ To understand HOW THE SYSTEM WORKS, read [`docs/HOW_IT_WORKS.md`](docs/HOW_IT_WORKS.md) first**
> (the mental model + architecture diagrams). This file is setup + known-issues; that one is the map.
Then `README.md` (original build briefing) and `docs/` for deep dives. Last updated 2026-06-17.
